name: pbxware-live-transcription
description: Self-hosted live call transcription dashboard for PBXware

scripts.build:all: bun build src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 --outfile dist/pbxware-live-transcription-linux-x64 && bun build src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-linux-x64-baseline --outfile dist/pbxware-live-transcription-linux-x64-baseline && bun build src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-linux-arm64 --outfile dist/pbxware-live-transcription-linux-arm64 && bun build src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-x64 --outfile dist/pbxware-live-transcription-darwin-x64 && bun build src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile dist/pbxware-live-transcription-darwin-arm64 && bun build src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-windows-x64 --outfile dist/pbxware-live-transcription-windows-x64.exe
